products.title: Panasonic 1.5 Ton 5 Star WiFi Inverter Smart Split AC (CS/CU-NU18BKY5WX)
products.short_description: Premium 1.5 Ton 5 Star WiFi-enabled inverter split AC with AI cooling, 8-in-1 convertible modes, and advanced air purification for efficient smart cooling.
products.long_description: The Panasonic 1.5 Ton 5 Star WiFi Inverter Smart Split AC (CS/CU-NU18BKY5WX) is designed for powerful yet energy-efficient cooling for medium-sized rooms. It features an advanced inverter compressor with 8-in-1 convertible cooling modes that automatically adjusts power based on room temperature and occupancy. Equipped with DustBuster technology, PM0.1 air purification filter, and ShieldBlu+ coating, it ensures cleaner and healthier air quality. The built-in WiFi and MirAIe app support allow remote control, voice commands, and smart scheduling. With 5-star energy efficiency, 4-way swing airflow, and AI-based cooling optimization, it delivers fast cooling even in extreme temperatures up to 55°C while maintaining low noise operation and long-term durability.
highlights: 1.5 Ton capacity ideal for medium rooms (120–170 sq ft)
5 Star energy rating with inverter compressor
WiFi-enabled smart control via MirAIe app
PM0.1 air purification filter for clean air
pros: Smart WiFi and app control features
Strong cooling performance even in extreme heat
offers: Cashback up to ₹1,349 via Amazon Pay

seo.meta_description: Buy Panasonic 1.5 Ton 5 Star WiFi Inverter Split AC with smart AI cooling, 8-in-1 modes, and PM0.1 filter. Best smart AC for Indian homes.
